title: Family Pet | #shorts
full_text: Mom, can I get a pet? >> Wait, how many times I said we don't do pet. Please, pet is a bad idea. Very bad idea. We don't need a pet in this house. Why are you even thinking about this kind of things? A lot of people I know, they've had dogs, cats, some have had turtles, and they said it's really fun and you can hang out with them when you're bored. What are you talking about? Who has dogs and cats and things? No one has dogs and cat. Turtle, what turtle is going to give for you? Before you were born, I asked Zoya and Brij. Zoya, bridge, you guys want a pet? You can have pet or you can have another baby in the house. And guess what they chose? Guess what they chose? So, am I the pet in a good way?
